title: Sean Ryan (American football coach)
extract: Sean Ryan (born May 1, 1972) is an American football coach currently serving as the Quarterbacks coach for the Syracuse Orange. He has previously served as an assistant coach for the Detroit Lions, Houston Texans, New York Giants, and the Carolina Panthers all of the National Football League (NFL), and is often cited for his development of star players including Victor Cruz, Odell Beckham Jr., Matthew Stafford, Eli Manning, and Deshaun Watson.
